ground_truth.title: Top 10 best luxury hotel brands in the world
ground_truth.author: Luxury Travel Expert
ground_truth.main_content: Monday newsletters always feature top 10 travel lists to inspire. Today: Top 10 best luxury hotel brands in the world. Over the past two decades, luxurious five-star (and even six and seven star) hotels and resorts have been popping up like mushrooms in all corners of the world. Although this is great news for discerning travelers, not all new expensive and glitzy hotels meet the standards of a true refined and memorable experience. Only a few hotel chains succeed at delivering the consistency of unrivaled excellence that luxury-minded globetrotters expect. These brands stand out with impeccable service, extraordinary locations, world-class wellness facilities, superlative gastronomy, spectacular accommodations, and environmental conscious policies. Here's the selection of the 10 best luxury hotel brands: 10. PARK HYATT - The most luxurious brand of Hyatt Hotel Group, located in major gateway cities, symbolizing luxury with impeccable service, world-class spas and state-of-the-art guest rooms. 9. ST REGIS - Born of a distinctive legacy from 1904, St Regis is associated with uncompromising elegance and bespoke service, the only luxury hospitality brand offering butler service at every hotel. 8. SIX SENSES - Founded in 1995, offering exceptional guest experiences in remote locations with unique eco-chic design, personal and sustainable approach. 7. BELMOND - Manages 49 iconic hotels, trains and river cruises in 24 countries, known for timeless hotels in Venice, Rio and St. Petersburg. 6. MANDARIN ORIENTAL - Grown from a well-respected Asian hotel company into a global brand over 50 years, with more than 30 hotels worldwide. 5. ROSEWOOD - Manages distinctive collection of highly individual, luxurious, residential-style hotels across the globe, including The Carlyle in New York and Hôtel de Crillon in Paris. 4. ONE&ONLY RESORTS - Created in 2002 for the luxury resort market, featuring highest-rated resorts in Maldives, Mexico, and Cape Town. 3. FOUR SEASONS - Probably the best known luxury hotel brand in the world, with more than 100 properties in five continents, founded in 1960. 2. AMAN - Meticulously designed to frame natural settings, renowned for breathtaking locations, locally inspired architecture, and ultimate privacy, with 31 ultra-luxe hotels in 20 countries. 1. SONEVA - Launched in 1995 by Sonu Shivdasani and Eva Malmstrom, pioneering back-to-nature luxury holidays with environmentally responsible lifestyle, now with world-class hotels in Maldives and Thailand.
with: Here's my selection of the 10 best luxury hotel brands in the world, the ones I happily return to again and again when traveling around the globe.

In 1995, Sonu Shivdasani, an Indian-British hotelier, launched the now world-famous Soneva Fushi resort on the deserted Maldivian island of Kunfunadhoo, pioneering a trend for back-to-nature luxury holidays.
Meticulously designed to frame their natural settings, Aman hotels are renowned for breathtaking locations, locally inspired architecture, and ultimate privacy.
Four Seasons is probably the best known luxury hotel brand in the world, with more than 100 properties in five continents and dozens of hotel projects in development.

The One&Only luxury hotel brand was created in 2002 exclusively for the luxury resort market by Solomon Kerzner, and now features some of the highest-rated resorts in the most idyllic spots in the world.
